scores.correctness_notes: Covers core components accurately (ContainerPath, LocalPath, PathProtocol, ensure_contents, RelativePathError). However, the ensure_contents signature has a wrong default: agent shows `mode: int = 0o644` but gold standard shows `mode: int | None = None`. Also omits key facts from gold standard: `str(path)` returns Pebble-suitable path string, comparison methods only work on same container.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several items not in gold standard and potentially fabricated: `DEFAULT_WRITE_MODE` and `DEFAULT_MKDIR_MODE` constants, `owner()` and `group()` methods on ContainerPath, `unlink()` and `rmdir()` methods, `is_file()` and `is_dir()`, `BinaryIO | TextIO` as source type (gold says `ReadableBuffer`). The ensure_contents `mode` default differs from gold standard (0o644 vs None), which may be fabricated.
